response.justification: The candidate has over a decade of software engineering experience, thoroughly exceeding the 6+ years requirement. They possess deep expertise in the required primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and specific experience with AI agent development, AWS, Kubernetes, and MongoDB. Their strong focus on TDD and software craftsmanship makes them an exceptionally strong fit for this Senior Fullstack role.
strengths: Deep expertise in the core stack, including TypeScript, Node.js, and React.
Directly relevant experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
Strong commitment to software craftsmanship, TDD, and CI/CD, demonstrated by building testing frameworks and leading workshops.
concerns: Lacks explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest, though highly experienced in Node.js and testing in general.
Concurrent ongoing founder role (GISCollective) may require clarification regarding overall bandwidth and time commitment.
History of relatively short tenures (1.5 to 3 years) across multiple recent positions.
